Update:

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.

Retailers like Amazon, Walmart, and others are at the ready to take orders on boxed copies and you won’t have to pay until later this year when it launches in November. All digital copies are expected to be live on the PS and Xbox storefronts tonight as well.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders go live tonight, here’s what you need to know
items.summary:
Update: Pre-orders are now live:

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-order at Amazon – NOW LIVE
  • Grand Theft Auto VI pre-order at Walmart (Live at midnight local time)
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-order at GameStop (Live at midnight local time)
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-order at PlayStation Store (All-digital) – NOW LIVE
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-order at Xbox Store (All-digital) – NOW LIVE

This is it folks, Grand Theft Auto VI is set to go up for preorder at midnight tonight (local time). It might not be easy to get your pre-order to go through, but we are here to help and make sure in-stock live listings are front and center all night.

Topological qubits, they said, would be the "building blocks" for their future quantum computer. Microsoft […]

items.title: Get up to 50% Prime Day discounts on Greenworks tools, batteries, robots, more – all starting from $51
items.summary: As part of the Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can currently score a large selection of Greenworks tools, devices, and even robots with up to 50% savings this week. One notable inclusion for folks wanting the most premium mowing experience is the 60V 54-inch MaximusZ Zero Turn Riding Lawn Mower with 2x 20.0Ah batteries, 4x 8.0Ah batteries, and a 1.5kW wall fast charger for $7,224.99 shipped, beating its direct website pricing by $1,275, where it’s still keeping to its full price of $8,500. While it’s been on the market for a while, it never sees discounts like its predecessors, though this particular bundle is getting a first-ever price cut at Amazon for $1,275 savings that sets the bar for any future deals that come along. Head below to browse through all the Greenworks Prime Day deals while they last.

items.title: Whisker offers a Prime Day price cut on its compact Litter-Robot EVO to $499, more from $599
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s ongoing Prime Day Sale, Whisker has its own Prime Day deals on bundles, as well as some first-ever price cuts on one of its latest models. That price cut is hitting the new Litter-Robot EVO for $499 shipped, or you can grab the 3-year warranty bundle at $599 shipped. These two options for the brand’s most compact model usually go for $599 and $699 normally, with discounts usually being on the bundle kits rather than the standalone litter boxes. Whisker is providing a first here, though, as $100 are cut from these two offers to set the bar for possible future discounts down the road. Head below to check out the full lineup of offers while they last through the week.
